topic: ACL main page 8 Conclusion boundary-tail polish

defect.class: conclusion short-tail line and ACL boundary prose
before_text_matches: page 8 line 055: Portable assets are useful only inside the gates
defect.reader_effect: The final Conclusion sentence ended with a weak one-line tail, and the wording sounded more like casual utility guidance than an ACL claim-boundary close.

changes.summary: Rewrote the second Conclusion paragraph to use formal evidence-boundary wording.
Changed embodied smoke tests to stack checks and closed with the benchmark-substitute boundary.

rejected_iterations.summary: First rewrite introduced ground- at a line end.
Second rewrite introduced ar- in artifact and left a one-word satisfies. tail.

after_evidence.targeted_scan_result: Page 8 shows the conclusion closing over balanced lines without the they pass. tail and without body-text hyphenation.
after_evidence.full_scan_result: The full after scan reports no body-text line-end hyphenation outside bibliography pages; pages 9-10 retain normal reference-column hyphenation.
after_evidence.visual_result: The conclusion now closes with an evidence-boundary statement and Limitations starts cleanly below it on the same page.

claim_boundary: Conclusion prose and linebreak behavior only. No metric values, evidence pools, figures, citations, metadata, or supported/forbidden claim scopes were changed.
residual_risk: Bibliography pages retain normal reference-column hyphenation.
